name: Ed Stafford: Left For Dead
overview: Explorer, adventurer and survival expert Ed Stafford faces a brand new challenge in "Left for Dead". Dropped in to a remote location, Ed has up to 10 days to reach a rendezvous point, meet his extraction transport and get out alive. If he doesn't make it he faces even more time in isolation, the humility of calling in team support and the embarrassment of failure!

trailers.title: *NEW* ED STAFFORD LEFT FOR DEAD | PROMO
